Container.Name: PlexHarvester
Container.Overview: PlexHarvester compares your local Plex library against shared remote servers, indexes FTP sources for automatic downloading, and provides MKV audio track management via MKVToolNix. Includes library snapshots, multilingual interface (FR/EN), and a real-time log viewer.

Config.Name: Web UI Port
Config.Description: Port for the PlexHarvester web interface.

Config.Name: Config Directory
Config.Description: Persistent storage for configuration, cache, and logs.

Config.Name: SECRET_KEY
Config.Description: Flask secret key for session security. If left empty, a key is auto-generated and saved to /config/secret_key.txt on first start.

Config.Name: Config Path (internal)
Config.Description: Internal path for configuration files. Do not change unless you have a specific reason.
